title: Reebok × Zivert
description: Collaboration with singer Zivert: custom Reebok sneakers for a promo campaign. A unique design reflecting the artist's style and the brand's DNA.

details.task: Create an exclusive pair of sneakers for a promo campaign featuring Zivert.
details.solution: Developed a design combining Reebok's signature elements with the artist's visual style.
details.result: The sneakers became the centerpiece of the campaign, with posts reaching over 500K views.
